cookbook_cmd: sglang serve --model-path zai-org/GLM-4.5-FP8 --tp 8 --reasoning-parser glm45 --tool-call-parser glm45 --attention-backend fa4
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-07 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real zai-org/GLM-4.5-FP8 SGLang TP=8 server in temporary container sglang-glm45. Used local NVMe HF cache in offline mode, trust_remote_code, reasoning_parser=glm45, tool_call_parser=glm45 (runtime normalized to glm), attention_backend=fa4, moe_runner_backend=triton for the Triton MoE tasks, CUDA graph prefill/decode disabled, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency.
